name: den
description: Den — private, self-hosted chat + media PWA for a closed circle

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,app -c blue,magenta "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w app run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w shared run build && npm -w server run build && npm -w app run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w shared run typecheck && npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w app run typecheck
scripts.test: npm -w server run test --if-present && npm -w app run test --if-present
